records.ety: [L. culmus stalk, stem; akin to calamus. SeeHalm.]

defs: The stalk or stem of grain and grasses (including the bamboo), jointed and usually hollow.

records.ety: [Perh. from W. cwlm knot or tie, applied to this species of coal, which is much found in balls or knots in some parts of Wales: cf. OE. culme smoke, soot.]

defs: Mineral coal that is not bituminous; anthracite, especially when found in small masses.
The waste of the Pennsylvania anthracite mines, consisting of fine coal, dust, etc., and used as fuel.
